title: Everything You Need to Know About Real-Time Analytics for Crypto Product Stores — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: As a digital creator in Nigeria, you're blocked from using PayPal to sell your ebook. You're not alone. With PayPal restrictions in place, you're forced to abandon your dreams of selling digital products online. But what if you could sell without PayPal? What if you could have real-time analytics for your crypto product store, no matter where you are in the world? You're about to find out how.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Real-time analytics for your crypto product store means you can see every order, every payment, and every delivery in real-time. This isn't just a nicety - it's a necessity for any serious digital creator. With Admin Dashboard's transaction logs, you'll have the visibility you need to optimize your sales strategy and grow your business. You'll be able to see which products are selling best, which regions are driving the most revenue, and which channels are bringing in the most customers.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Admin Dashboard uses NOWPayments, a payment processor that integrates with your crypto wallet. This means you can accept payments in 300+ different coins, without the need for a PayPal account. The technology is designed to be seamless, with automated delivery and payment verification built right in. You don't need to worry about complex setup or integration - just configure Admin Dashboard and start selling.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Admin Dashboard is built for digital creators like you, who are stuck with PayPal restrictions or struggling to find a payment processor that works. Whether you're in Nigeria, Ghana, or anywhere else in the world, Admin Dashboard gives you the freedom to sell your digital products without getting held back by payment processor limitations. We're talking ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, presets, beats, and plugins - anything that can be sold digitally.
Admin Dashboard gives you real-time visibility into every order, every payment, and every delivery.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Admin Dashboard includes three key components: transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics. With these features, you'll be able to see every order, every payment, and every delivery in real-time. You'll also have the ability to manage your orders and track your sales. And with real-time analytics, you'll be able to make data-driven decisions to optimize your sales strategy and grow your business.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you know what Admin Dashboard can do, it's time to take action. Start by setting up your account and configuring the payment processor. Then, create your digital products and list them for sale on your store. Use the transaction logs and order management tools to track your sales and deliveries. And with real-time analytics, you'll be able to see which products are selling best and make data-driven decisions to optimize your sales strategy.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
With Admin Dashboard, you can sell digital products without PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for ways to sell ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, presets, beats, or plugins without PayPal, you're in the right place. Admin Dashboard gives you the freedom to sell your digital products online without getting held back by payment processor limitations. Plus, with our Shop, you can easily view and manage your digital products, and even sell them directly to your customers. Check it out at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with Admin Dashboard and start selling your digital products online, follow these steps: Set up your account and configure the payment processor. Create your digital products and list them for sale on your store. Use the transaction logs and order management tools to track your sales and deliveries. View and manage your digital products in our Shop. Take advantage of real-time analytics to optimize your sales strategy and grow your business.
Real-time analytics means you can make data-driven decisions to optimize your sales strategy and grow your business.
Admin Dashboard — $29.99. Transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics. See every order, every payment, every delivery — from anywhere in the world.
